caption: A woman with short dark hair and glasses is positioned in front of a plain black background. She wears a light green, long-sleeved tunic with delicate red and blue floral embroidery around the neckline, complemented by a dark beaded necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her garment. The "NPTEL" logo is visible in the bottom-left corner of each scene. Throughout the sequence, the woman speaks directly to the camera; she begins with her eyes open and a slight smile, then briefly closes her eyes and tilts her head slightly as she continues talking, before returning to an open-eyed, attentive expression. Her posture remains consistent, and the static background and camera angle do not change, focusing entirely on her facial expressions and speech.
